relations.subject: Grasshopper buzzard
relations.evidence: thumb|Grasshopper buzzard in The Gambia, West Africa The grasshopper buzzard (Butastur rufipennis) is a species of bird of prey in the family Accipitridae which is found in a narrow zone of sub-Saharan Africa north of the equator

relations.subject: Grasshopper buzzard
relations.evidence: It also can be found in marshes' edges and over burnt areas
